All Industries

SAM4 goes where rotating equipment goes.

Electrical Signature Analysis is industry-agnostic. It reads the motor's electrical signal to detect faults in any connected drivetrain. These are the industries where we've proven it.

10,000+
Assets monitored
5,300+
Verified findings
7
Industry verticals
30+
Countries deployed

Core industries with dedicated solutions

Water & Wastewater

Protect pumps, blowers, and critical infrastructure across drinking water and wastewater networks. SAM4 detects bearing wear, cavitation, and seal degradation from the MCC.

2,300+ findings Pumps • Blowers • Motors
Explore Water & Wastewater →

Oil & Gas

Monitor ESPs, seawater lift pumps, gas compressors, and thermal plant auxiliaries. ESA works in hazardous zones without additional field sensors.

Upstream & downstream ESPs • Compressors • Turbines
Explore Oil & Gas →

Metals & Mining

Harsh environments, remote sites, critical uptime. SAM4 monitors mills, crushers, conveyors, and slurry pumps across the processing chain.

Heavy-duty assets Mills • Crushers • Slurry pumps
Explore Metals & Mining →

Chemicals

Continuous-process plants with high criticality. ESA monitors reactor agitators, transfer pumps, and cooling fans without entering hazardous areas.

ATEX-compatible Agitators • Pumps • Fans
Explore Chemicals →

More industries with proven deployments

Airports

Baggage handling, HVAC, and terminal infrastructure. SAM4 monitors the rotating assets that keep airports running 24/7.

Baggage systems HVAC Conveyors
Explore →

Pulp & Paper

Continuous process monitoring for refiners, pumps, and dryers across pulp and paper manufacturing.

Refiners Pumps Dryers
Explore →

Energy Efficiency

Reduce energy waste across motor-driven systems. SAM4 Energy identifies savings from 3% up to 37% per asset.

Pumps Compressors Motors
Explore →

Food & Beverage

Hygiene-critical environments with hard-to-reach assets. ESA monitors without physical contact or process disruption.

Mixers Pumps Conveyors
Coming soon

Manufacturing

General manufacturing lines with motors, gearboxes, and fans. Predictive maintenance at scale.

Motors Fans Gearboxes
Coming soon

Tank Storage

Transfer pumps and agitators in bulk liquid storage facilities. Remote monitoring without field visits.

Pumps Agitators Motors
Coming soon

Don't see your industry?

SAM4 reads the electrical signature of any AC motor. If your facility runs motors, we can monitor them — regardless of industry.

Talk to an engineer

See what condition monitoring could save across your motor fleet.
